agencyCaregivingJobs.title: Caregiving jobs
agencyCaregivingJobs.subtitle: Link accepted guardian–agency (GAC) and caregiver–agency (CAC) contracts into operational jobs.
agencyCaregivingJobs.demoOnly: Caregiving jobs are available when the app is connected to Supabase.
agencyCaregivingJobs.noAgency: Sign in as an agency user to manage caregiving jobs.
agencyCaregivingJobs.createHint: Pick a GAC that matches your CAC (package path: package_gac with package_caregiver). Use a distinct assignment label if the same caregiver contract appears twice on one job.
agencyCaregivingJobs.addCaregiverHint: Same compatibility rules as create. Duplicate CAC is allowed with a different assignment label.
agencyCaregivingJobs.emptyJobs: No jobs yet. Create one above once you have accepted package engagements.
agencyCaregivingJobs.noAssignments: No caregiver assignments on this job.

experience.disclaimerLead: You’re in a browser-only preview. Nothing here is saved to the real CareNet production database.
